zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bowes於1375年1月1日出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir William de la Bowes I45歲，母親Maud de Dalton40歲。他於1395年與Jane Conyers在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年12月22日在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特博熱享年46歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆包維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bowes was born on 1 January 1375, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William de la Bowes I, was 45 and his mother, Maud de Dalton, was 40. He married Jane Conyers in 1395, in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 22 December 1421, in Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Bowes, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bowes est né le 1 janvier 1375, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de la Bowes I, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Maud de Dalton, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Jane Conyers en 1395, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1421, à Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Bowes, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Bowes am 1. Januar 1375 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de la Bowes I 45 und seine Mutter Maud de Dalton 40. Er hat 1395 in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom Jane Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1421 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Bowes, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bowes è nato il il 1 gennaio 1375 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de la Bowes I, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Dalton, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Jane Conyers nel 1395, nel Durham, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1421, nel Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Bowes, Durham, England.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bowes родился 1 января 1375 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de la Bowes I было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Dalton, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Conyers в 1395 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 декабря 1421 г. в местности баугe, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности боуесь, дурам, Англия.
